problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: If DNA computing for massively parallel search is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Theoretical complexity proof with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
